input.userMessage: ข้อเสนอผ่อน 16-18 เดือนนี้รู้สึกว่าสั้นไปค่ะ พอจะขยายระยะเวลาผ่อนให้นานกว่านี้ได้อีกไหมคะ

input.narrative: The user is asking for information about the 'Khun Soo Rao Chuay' program. The conversation is being routed to the education agent to provide an explanation.

expectedOutput.narrative: The advisor proposed two restructuring plans with 16-18 month terms. The customer finds this period too short and is requesting an extension. The conversation is being routed back to the advisor to generate a revised plan with a longer duration.
